title: Brooklyn Bridge
content:
Pythoness body - arching
    Over the night like an ecstasy - 
    I feel your coils tightening...
    And the world's lessening breath.
meaning:
"Brooklyn Bridge" is a quintessential example of Lola Ridge's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
